command:
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup
git pull origin main

echo "=== CREATE router-governance-contract.md ==="
cat > agents/chatgpt/router-governance-contract.md << 'MDEOF'
# Router Governance Contract

## Purpose

This contract defines what governance information the Moreno AI router must know at all times.

The router does not enforce governance in Phase 8B. It is aware of it.

---

## Current Phase

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Phase | 8B |
| Name | Router Governance Integration |
| Status | Active |

---

## Current Baseline Tag

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Tag | Phase8A-SentinelFoundation |
| Committed | Yes |
| Location | `baselines/production/router/` |

---

## Current Production Commit

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Commit | a83990c |
| Message | Phase 8A Sentinel Foundation |
| Repository | Moreno-AI |

---

## Sentinel Status

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Sentinel | Defined |
| Phase | 8A complete |
| Enforcement | Not yet active (Phase 8C) |
| Files | `agents/sentinel/personality.md` |
| | `agents/sentinel/responsibilities.md` |
| | `agents/sentinel/permissions.md` |
| | `agents/sentinel/decision-tree.md` |

---

## Governance Version

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Constitution | v1.0 |
| Governance Framework | v1.0 |
| Change Request Protocol | v1.0 |
| Baseline Promotion Workflow | v1.0 |
| Sentinel | v1.0 |

---

## Repository URLs

| Repository | URL |
|------------|-----|
| Gitea (primary) | http://192.168.0.191:3000/jose/Moreno-AI |
| GitHub (mirror) | https://github.com/itechguy2011/Moreno-AI |
| Bridge repo | https://github.com/itechguy2011/homelab-bridge |

---

## Active Modules

| Module | Status |
|--------|--------|
| router | Production |
| docker | Production |
| filesystem | Production |
| sentinel | Defined — not yet enforcing |

---

## Production Workflow

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Workflow Name | chatgpt-homelab-agent-router |
| Platform | n8n |
| Host | http://192.168.0.191:5678 |

---

## Production Webhook

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Webhook URL | http://192.168.0.191:5678/webhook/chatgpt-homelab-agent |
| Status | Active |

---

## Phase 8B Contract Rule

The router must not be modified without:

1. This contract being updated
2. A change request following `governance/change-request-protocol.md`
3. A baseline stored in `baselines/development/router/`
4. Sentinel review (manual in Phase 8B, automated in Phase 8C)

---

*Phase 8B — Router is governance-aware. Enforcement begins Phase 8C.*
MDEOF

echo "=== CREATE router-runtime-state.md ==="
cat > docs/router-runtime-state.md << 'MDEOF'

MDEOF

echo "=== CREATE module-registry.md ==="
cat > docs/module-registry.md << 'MDEOF'
# Moreno AI Module Registry

## Purpose

Official registry of all Moreno AI modules.

All active modules must be registered here before production use.

---

## Registry

### router

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Module Name | router |
| Status | Production |
| Version | Phase6B2 |
| Owner | chatgpt-homelab-agent |
| Baseline | `baselines/production/router/` |
| Baseline Tag | Phase6B2-RouterHealth |
| Description | Core request router. Handles all incoming commands and dispatches to appropriate module. Entry point for all Moreno AI operations. |

---

### docker

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Module Name | docker |
| Status | Production |
| Version | Phase6B2 |
| Owner | chatgpt-homelab-agent |
| Baseline | `baselines/production/docker/` |
| Baseline Tag | Phase6B2-RouterHealth |
| Description | Docker and Portainer management module. Handles container operations, service management, and Docker administration tasks. |

---

### filesystem

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Module Name | filesystem |
| Status | Production |
| Version | Phase6B2 |
| Owner | chatgpt-homelab-agent |
| Baseline | `baselines/production/filesystem/` |
| Baseline Tag | Phase6B2-RouterHealth |
| Description | Filesystem operations module. Handles file reading, writing, listing, and path management across the homelab. |

---

### sentinel

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Module Name | sentinel |
| Status | Defined |
| Version | Phase8A |
| Owner | Moreno AI Governance |
| Baseline | `agents/sentinel/` |
| Baseline Tag | Phase8A-SentinelFoundation |
| Description | Governance enforcement agent. Validates all changes against the Moreno AI constitution and change request protocol. Not yet enforcing — active Phase 8C. |

---

## Registration Rule

Before any new module is created:

1. Add entry to this registry
2. Define baseline location
3. Define owner
4. Commit registry update
5. No module is production until registered here

---

*Last updated: Phase 8B — Router Governance Integration*
MDEOF

echo "=== COMMIT ==="
git add .
git status
git commit -m "Phase 8B Router Governance Integration"

echo "=== TAG ==="
git tag Phase8B-RouterGovernanceIntegration

echo "=== PUSH GITEA ==="
git push origin main
git push origin Phase8B-RouterGovernanceIntegration

echo "=== PUSH GITHUB ==="
git push github main
git push github Phase8B-RouterGovernanceIntegration

echo "=== VERIFY ==="
echo "--- new files ---"
ls -lah agents/chatgpt/
ls -lah docs/
echo "--- tags ---"
git tag -l
echo "--- log ---"
git log --oneline -6
